\begin{tikzpicture}
    \begin{axis}[
        axis lines=left,
        xlabel={real axis},
        ylabel={imaginary axis},
        zlabel={},
        xmin=-1, xmax=3,
        ymin=-1, ymax=1,
        zmin=0, zmax=1,
        view={120}{30},
        grid=major,
        colormap/blackwhite,
    ]
    \addplot3[
        surf,
        shader=faceted,
        samples=30,
        samples y=30,
        domain=0:1,
        domain y=0:2*pi,
    ]
    ({(1+0.5*x)*cos(deg(y))}, {(1+0.5*x)*sin(deg(y))}, {x});
    \addplot3[
        domain=0:2*pi,
        samples=100,
        samples y=0,
        thick,
    ]
    ({(1+0.5*0)*cos(deg(x))}, {(1+0.5*0)*sin(deg(x))}, {0});
    \addplot3[
        domain=0:2*pi,
        samples=100,
        samples y=0,
        thick,
    ]
    ({(1+0.5*0.25)*cos(deg(x))}, {(1+0.5*0.25)*sin(deg(x))}, {0.25});
    \addplot3[
        domain=0:2*pi,
        samples=100,
        samples y=0,
        thick,
    ]
    ({(1+0.5*0.5)*cos(deg(x))}, {(1+0.5*0.5)*sin(deg(x))}, {0.5});
    \addplot3[
        domain=0:2*pi,
        samples=100,
        samples y=0,
        thick,
    ]
    ({(1+0.5*0.75)*cos(deg(x))}, {(1+0.5*0.75)*sin(deg(x))}, {0.75});
    \addplot3[
        domain=0:2*pi,
        samples=100,
        samples y=0,
        thick,
    ]
    ({(1+0.5*1)*cos(deg(x))}, {(1+0.5*1)*sin(deg(x))}, {1});
    \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
